summary: Procurement Board Module - Complete testing of all APIs and UI. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI fully functional with dashboard metrics, tabs (Pending/Pricing/Waiting/Approved/Delivered), pricing dialog, vendor quote management, and full workflow integration.
seed_data_creation: Test procurement pricing records created during testing with TEST_procurement_workflow prefix in remarks
context_for_next_testing_agent: Procurement Board module fully functional. Procurement user (Sneha Reddy) can view pending material requests (planning_approved status), start pricing, add vendor quotes, select vendor, and submit for accounts approval. The workflow: Site Engineer creates material request → Planning approves → Procurement starts pricing → Procurement adds vendor quotes → Procurement selects vendor → Procurement submits for accounts → Accounts approves/rejects. Vendor master has 'ABC Cement Suppliers' seeded.

procurement_dashboard_api.GET /api/procurement/dashboard: PASS - Returns metrics (pending_requests, pricing_in_progress, waiting_accounts, approved_orders, delivered_orders, total_in_pricing, credit_outstanding, vendor_spend)

vendor_master_api.GET /api/vendor-master: PASS - Returns list of vendors (ABC Cement Suppliers seeded)
vendor_master_api.POST /api/procurement/add-vendor: PASS - Adds new vendor to master

procurement_pricing_api.POST /api/procurement/start-pricing/{req: PASS - Creates pricing record, changes status to pricing_in_progress
procurement_pricing_api.GET /api/procurement/pricing/{pricing_id: PASS - Returns pricing details with original request, vendors, price history
procurement_pricing_api.POST /api/procurement/pricing/{pricing_i: PASS - Adds vendor quote with calculated total
PASS - Submits for accounts, changes status to waiting_accounts

full_workflow.complete_flow: PASS - Site Engineer → Planning → Procurement → Accounts workflow tested end-to-end

frontend_procurement_dashboard.page_loads: PASS - Procurement Board header displayed with user info (Sneha Reddy - PROCUREMENT)
frontend_procurement_dashboard.dashboard_metrics: PASS - 5 metric cards (Pending, Pricing, Waiting, Approved, Delivered) with correct counts
frontend_procurement_dashboard.financial_summary: PASS - Value in Pricing, Credit Outstanding, Top Vendors displayed
frontend_procurement_dashboard.tabs_navigation: PASS - All 5 tabs (Pending, Pricing, Waiting, Approved, Delivered) clickable and load correct data
frontend_procurement_dashboard.table_display: PASS - Desktop table shows Order ID, Project, Material, Qty, Engineer, Amount, Status, Action columns
frontend_procurement_dashboard.mobile_view: PASS - Mobile card view available for smaller screens

frontend_pricing_dialog.dialog_opens: PASS - Material Pricing dialog opens on Add Pricing/Continue button click
frontend_pricing_dialog.request_details: PASS - Shows Order ID, Project, Material, Quantity
frontend_pricing_dialog.vendor_quotes_section: PASS - Shows existing quotes with vendor name, unit price, qty, transport, discount, total
frontend_pricing_dialog.add_quote_form: PASS - Vendor dropdown, Unit Price, Quantity, Transport, Discount inputs, Add Quote button
frontend_pricing_dialog.vendor_selection: PASS - Select button marks vendor as selected with green badge
frontend_pricing_dialog.submit_button: PASS - Submit for Accounts Approval button (disabled until vendor selected)
frontend_pricing_dialog.validation: PASS - Shows error toast when vendor/price not selected

frontend_view_dialog.approved_view: PASS - View button on approved orders opens read-only pricing details
frontend_view_dialog.price_history: PASS - Shows historical vendor prices for the material

mocked_apis.none: All APIs are real - no mocked endpoints

workflow_tested.material_request_to_procurement: Site Engineer creates request → Planning approves → Request appears in Procurement Board Pending tab
workflow_tested.procurement_pricing_flow: Start Pricing → Add Vendor Quotes → Select Vendor → Submit for Accounts
workflow_tested.accounts_approval: Accounts approves → Order moves to Approved tab
workflow_tested.dashboard_metrics_update: Metrics update correctly as orders move through workflow

ui_elements_verified.navigation: Dashboard link, Vendors link, User info, Logout button
ui_elements_verified.financial_cards: Value in Pricing, Credit Outstanding, Top Vendors
ui_elements_verified.tabs: Pending, Pricing, Waiting, Approved, Delivered with underline indicator
ui_elements_verified.table_columns: ORDER ID, PROJECT, MATERIAL, QTY, ENGINEER, AMOUNT, STATUS, ACTION
ui_elements_verified.dialog_elements: Request Details, Vendor Quotes, Add Vendor Quote form, Cancel, Submit buttons
